nodes.name: package_version_check.sh
nodes.summary: CI utility script that checks package versions across branches to detect unintended version regressions or mismatches in CI artifacts.

nodes.name: pr-fuzz-test.sh
nodes.summary: Minimal CI script that triggers the sqlsmith fuzz test for pull requests.

nodes.name: pulsar-source-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that produces test messages to a Pulsar topic and runs SLT tests verifying Pulsar source ingestion.

nodes.name: regress-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI regression test script that runs PostgreSQL regression tests against RisingWave to verify SQL compatibility.

nodes.name: release.sh
nodes.summary: CI release script that builds release binaries, packages them, and uploads artifacts to S3 and GitHub releases.

nodes.name: remove-micro-bench-results.sh
nodes.summary: CI cleanup script that removes micro-benchmark result files from S3 to avoid stale comparisons.

nodes.name: run-backfill-tests.sh
nodes.summary: Comprehensive CI script that runs a battery of backfill correctness and performance tests, including snapshot backfill, arrangement backfill, scale-in, and sink recovery scenarios.

nodes.name: restart_cn
nodes.summary: Restarts compute nodes with configurable backfill rate limits to test backfill resumption after node recovery.

nodes.name: test_snapshot_and_upstream_read
nodes.summary: Tests that snapshot reads and upstream change propagation both work correctly during backfill.

nodes.name: test_backfill_tombstone
nodes.summary: Tests that deleted rows (tombstones) are handled correctly during backfill, ensuring data consistency.

nodes.name: test_replication_with_column_pruning
nodes.summary: Tests that materialized views with column pruning replicate correctly during backfill.

nodes.name: test_sink_backfill_recovery
nodes.summary: Tests that sink jobs resume correctly after backfill interruption, verifying exactly-once delivery semantics.

nodes.name: test_arrangement_backfill_snapshot_and_upstream_runtime
nodes.summary: Tests arrangement backfill combining snapshot reads with concurrent upstream mutations.

nodes.name: test_no_shuffle_backfill_snapshot_and_upstream_runtime
nodes.summary: Tests no-shuffle backfill mode combining snapshot reads with concurrent upstream mutations.

nodes.name: test_backfill_snapshot_runtime
nodes.summary: Tests backfill with various runtime snapshot configurations to ensure correctness under different storage settings.

nodes.name: test_backfill_snapshot_with_limited_storage_throughput
nodes.summary: Tests backfill correctness when storage throughput is throttled, simulating resource-constrained environments.

nodes.name: test_backfill_snapshot_with_wider_rows
nodes.summary: Tests backfill correctness with wide rows (many columns) to verify memory and I/O handling.

nodes.name: test_snapshot_backfill
nodes.summary: Tests the snapshot backfill feature end-to-end, verifying that MVs are populated correctly from a historical snapshot.

nodes.name: test_scale_in
nodes.summary: Tests backfill correctness during scale-in operations, verifying data completeness when compute nodes are removed mid-backfill.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that parses test mode flags and dispatches to individual backfill test functions.

nodes.name: run-deterministic-fuzz-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI fuzz test script that runs sqlsmith in deterministic simulation mode, extracting failing SQL queries for diagnosis.

nodes.name: run-fuzz-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI fuzz test script that runs sqlsmith against a live cluster, backing up and restoring logs and extracting error SQL for analysis.

nodes.name: run-meta-backup-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that tests metadata backup and restore procedures by creating a backup, restarting the cluster from backup, and verifying data integrity.

nodes.name: run-micro-benchmarks.sh
nodes.summary: CI micro-benchmark script that runs Criterion benchmarks, compares results against historical baselines, and uploads results to S3.

nodes.name: bench
nodes.summary: Runs a single Criterion benchmark suite, compares results with a stored baseline, and reports regressions.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that iterates over all benchmark suites, invokes the bench function, and uploads aggregate results to S3.

nodes.name: run-unit-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that runs Rust unit tests across the workspace using nextest with appropriate configuration.

nodes.name: rustc-workspace-wrapper.sh
nodes.summary: Rustc compiler wrapper script used in CI to intercept compilation commands for custom toolchain configuration or caching.

nodes.name: s3-source-test-for-opendal-fs-engine.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for S3 source connector using the OpenDAL filesystem engine backend.

nodes.name: s3-source-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for S3 source connector, uploading test files to S3 and verifying RisingWave can ingest them.

nodes.name: setup-vault.sh
nodes.summary: CI script that configures HashiCorp Vault with secrets and policies needed for CI pipeline authentication and secrets management.

nodes.name: single-node-utils.sh
nodes.summary: Shared utility functions for CI scripts that manage single-node RisingWave deployments: start, stop, wait for ready, and restart.

nodes.name: wait_single_node
nodes.summary: Polls the single-node RisingWave instance until it is ready to accept connections, with configurable timeout.

nodes.name: slow-e2e-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for slow/long-running test suites that are excluded from the standard parallel test runs.

nodes.name: sqlsmith-differential-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI differential testing script that runs sqlsmith-generated queries against two RisingWave versions and compares results to detect regressions.

nodes.name: standalone-utils.sh
nodes.summary: Shared utility functions for CI scripts managing standalone RisingWave deployments: start with or without compactor, stop, wait for ready, and restart.

nodes.name: start_standalone_without_compactor
nodes.summary: Starts a standalone RisingWave instance without the compactor component, configuring all process parameters and storage paths.

nodes.name: start_standalone
nodes.summary: Starts a full standalone RisingWave instance including the compactor, configuring all process parameters and storage paths.

nodes.name: wait_standalone
nodes.summary: Polls the standalone RisingWave instance until all components are ready to accept connections, with timeout handling.
